title: Improve prelock timing schedule
reason: Decision outcome ledger includes expired or prelock unavailable decisions.
expected_impact: Reduces non-actionable PRELOCK outcomes caused by late or missing execution windows.
risk: Low if limited to scheduling and reporting diagnostics.
recommended_action: Review AUTO/PRELOCK timing so resolver runs before kickoff and captures a useful in-window slot.

title: Keep actionable and non-actionable buckets separated
reason: The current day has waiting or blocked decisions.
expected_impact: Keeps ledger/backtest interpretation aligned with execution reality.
recommended_action: Continue reporting all rows, actionable only, non-actionable, and graded bets separately.

title: Target API enrichment to candidate fixtures only
reason: Coverage gaps are present, but broad calendar enrichment would add cost and repo churn.
expected_impact: Improves prelock evidence where it matters without expanding data volume unnecessarily.
risk: Medium; API quotas and cache growth must be controlled.
recommended_action: Fetch lineups only for candidate picks in-window, injuries only for reliable leagues, and fixture statistics only for TOP candidates; keep cache bounds.

title: Collect more closed decision quality outcomes
reason: Decision Quality Review has fewer than 30 resolved rows.
expected_impact: Avoids premature recalibration or execution-rule changes from a thin sample.
recommended_action: Keep building the quality review after POST labels are available.

title: Defer recalibration until minimum closed-pick sample
reason: Fewer than 30 closed picks are available.
expected_impact: Avoids fitting thresholds or probability adjustments to noise.
risk: Low; no predictive change is applied.
recommended_action: Keep calibration reporting active and wait for at least 30 closed picks before suggestions.
